info.english_meaning: to weaveto sewto compose to knit
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: vayane vayatItyevaM tantusantAna izyate ' (Slo. 10) iti devaH  ' tantusantAno nAma pawanirmARArTaM tantUnAM tiryagatiryak prasAraRaviSezaH ' - bAlamanoramA

upasargachandrika.example_text: proyate'syAmiti pravARI pravayanti tayeti vA pravARI (kASikA 5.4.160)
'tarucCidraprotAn (SaSinaH karAn) bisamiti karI saNkalayati' (suBA॰) protAn prasyUtAn
'tatra sarvamidaM protamotaM cEvAKilaM jagat tato jagajjagattasmin sa jagaccAKilaM mune' (vizRu॰pu॰2.64) ukto'rTaH
'aTo diSyeva diSaM pra vayati' (tE0 saM0 57939) pravayati protAM karoti koRAsu dikzu anyAsAmanupraveSAd diSaH protA ityucyante
'pra vayApa vayetyAsate tate' (f0 101301) pravARaM BoktavyaprapaYcasya nirmARam
'ime vayanti pitaro ya AyayuH pra vayApavayetyAsate tate' (f॰10.130.1) ihApavayatirutasyAnutIkaraRe vartate apaSabdo DAtvarTaM viparItayati
'(AsandI) muYjavivayanA Bavati' (Sa0 brA0 12836) muYjavivayanA muYjavivAnA muYjErutA
'anDo maRimaviDyattamanaNgulirAvayat' (tE0 brA0 yogaBAzye 431 ityatrodDftam) Avayat sUtre prAvayat protamakarot
'ye antA yAvatIH sico ya otavo ye ca tantavaH' (aTarva0 14251) oyante proyanta ityotavaH protAni sUtrARi
'AdityaM paYcaBI raSmiBirudavayan' (tE0 brA0 1242) udavayan udanahyan uccErBAge'baDnannityarTaH
'tasmAdraTaH paryuto darSanIyatamo Bavati' (Sa0 brA0 13278) paryuto raTaguptyA yutaH
